name: Turaco Gold Limited
description: Turaco Gold Limited (ASX:TCG) is an ASX-listed gold exploration and development company focused on advancing the Afema Gold Project in southern Côte d’Ivoire, West Africa. Since acquiring the project in 2024, the company has rapidly developed it into a significant gold asset, supported by a maiden JORC Mineral Resource Estimate of 2.52Moz and subsequent growth. Led by an experienced board with a proven track record in gold discovery and development, Turaco maintains an active exploration program across a large tenement package, aiming to expand its resource base and deliver value through strategic exploration and development.
